status: DRAFT — the cascade, the decision-table fixtures, the provenance validator, the clean-successor ORCHESTRATION (with a dry-run integration test), per-row numerical evidence, structural outcome validation, checkpoint-integrity + row-identity enforcement, and the countersigned-input loaders are implemented and tested. What remains before countersignature is intrinsically image-/commit-level: the physical corpus regeneration under the authorized run, the final implementation commit, the full OCI config digest, the countersigned expected-pins + authorization artifacts, the in-image realism-harness PASS artifact, and a final (clean-tree, in-image, production-binding-run) test report. No Stage-3 instance has been run.

source_manifest.note: 19 load-bearing source files (git blob + sha256 + bytes); verify_source now enforces completeness (declared==manifest set, roles, byte_length) — finding 14; governance_artifacts + pending_at_countersignature sections added — finding 15

test_report.caveat: development evidence only — dirty tree + production-binding test skipped (findings 28, 32)

components.finalized_cascade: apps/backend/app/research/mr002/stage3_cascade.py (solver-scoped, canonicalize-once, frozen evidence, sealable _REAL, validate_outcome, numerical_evidence)
components.clean_successor_runner: apps/backend/scripts/mr002_stage3_population_runner.py (run_population + orchestrate + loaders; + tests, 29 incl. dry-run integration)

1_run_clean_successor_not_implemented.status: IMPLEMENTED (orchestration) + INTEGRATION-TESTED; physical corpus regen remains under the authorized run
1_run_clean_successor_not_implemented.where: orchestrate(OrchestrationConfig): corpus source -> verify corpus hash directly -> run_population -> reconcile -> write run manifest -> disposition; dry-run test test_orchestration_dry_run_* exercises it on a tiny synthetic corpus

2_preflight_cannot_pass_empty_pins.where: load_expected_pins parses a countersigned pins artifact and requires EVERY pin (versions, fingerprints, material config); run_clean_successor supplies the full ExpectedPins

3_self_referential_source_verification.where: load_static_manifest loads the COMMITTED manifest and hash-verifies it against the authorization artifact; verify_source runs the checkout against THAT — build_manifest is never used as the runtime expected-source

4_authorization_is_just_an_env_var.where: load_authorization verifies the artifact's own SHA-256 (supplied via an independent channel) and its bound commit/tree/image/oci/manifest/pins fields; a bare nonempty env var no longer satisfies the gate

5_image_oci_self_attested.where: expected identities come from the countersigned pins (independent of the observed env channel); observed image/OCI still read from env — a signed launch attestation from the runtime is required (documented). Preflight compares independent channels and requires a FULL OCI digest

6_no_numerical_evidence.where: numerical_evidence(): input content hash, accepted z + dual as EXACT rationals, z/lam sha256, certificate residual/interval fields; every record carries record_sha256, verifiable after round-trip

7_qualified_outcomes_not_validated.where: validate_outcome() gate in the runner; any structural inconsistency (missing evidence, enum/accepted_by mismatch, stop-with-accepted) -> MALFORMED_OUTCOME -> STOP

8_resolver_exceptions_not_preserved.where: the per-row body + row-iterator advance are wrapped; any exception -> FAILED terminal with {exception_class, message_sha256, traceback_sha256} + non-resumable

9_failed_checkpoint_not_refused.where: precheck_checkpoint refuses ANY preexisting FAILED/COMPLETE/nonempty checkpoint before opening; raises CheckpointRefused

10_trailing_partial_unsafe.where: read_checkpoint flags a trailing partial line; precheck refuses CHECKPOINT_TRAILING_PARTIAL (no blind append)

11_n_expected_self_fulfilling.where: n_expected is now the row-identity manifest length (mandatory, bound before row 0); zero-row and truncated inputs cannot self-certify

12_duplicate_reordered_rows.where: RowIdentityManifest binds the canonical ordered {row_id, content_hash} set; the runner verifies unique IDs, exact order, per-row content hash, first/last, and one-to-one; aggregate_verdict re-checks id equality

13_git_success_not_checked.where: _git requires returncode 0 + empty stderr, runs status --porcelain once (no TOCTOU race)

14_source_verifier_incompleteness.where: verify_source now checks declared-set == manifest-set, role match, and byte_length in addition to both hashes

15_19_files_incomplete.where: source manifest adds governance_artifacts (bound when present) + pending_at_countersignature; the note no longer claims to bind 'every load-bearing dependency'

16_import_hygiene_not_allowlist.where: cascade_import_hygiene is now a POSITIVE allowlist (loaded MR-002 modules must be a subset of the approved set); evaluated before corpus regen. Runtime audit, not static proof — the source manifest + image carry the static guarantee

17_corpus_constant_not_content.where: orchestrate hashes the REGENERATED corpus bytes directly and compares to the expected hash before any solve; preflight's constant check is relabelled corpus_hash_constant

18_package_pin_completeness.where: ExpectedPins.required_packages is a CLOSED set {numpy,scipy,quadprog,piqp,clarabel,highspy,mpmath}; a missing pin or an unpinned present package FAILS

19_fingerprints_dont_bind_behavior.where: the fingerprint check documents that it binds selected Python source only, NOT native binaries/BLAS/closures/globals — those are covered by the image digest + closed package set

20_validated_inputs_not_canonicalized.where: resolve() calls canonicalize(rec) ONCE into read-only arrays used by validation, primary, fallback, certifier, and record hashing — no TOCTOU

21_attempt_arrays_mutable.where: normalize freezes Attempt.z/lam via _frozen_copy; accepted_z is a separate read-only copy

22_default_cache_mutable_global.where: _REAL is a _SealableRegistry; seal_implementations() binds once, verifies fingerprints against pins, and blocks reassignment; execution runs in a one-shot container

23_model_invariants_incomplete.where: t>0, upper>=0, shapes/ndim/finiteness enforced; the full contract derived formally from _qp_matrices is enumerated as a remaining item

24_runtime_binding_failure_still_passes.where: harness PASS now requires a complete, error-free runtime block (_runtime_complete) in addition to all cases passing

25_output_hash_omits_numerics.where: harness _out_hash hashes the full numerical_evidence (z/lam exact ratios + certificate), not just summary

26_suboptimal_origin_claim_false.where: the certifier-rejection case labels candidate_kind per problem (primal_infeasible_origin for the equality problem) instead of claiming feasibility

27_harness_persistence_not_atomic.where: harness uses _atomic_write_json (tmp -> fsync -> atomic rename -> dir fsync) + post-write round-trip verification

28_production_binding_skipped.status: ACKNOWLEDGED — must run in the pinned image before countersignature (open item)

29_runner_tests_dont_exercise_real_entry.where: test_orchestration_dry_run_* exercises the real orchestrate() on a tiny synthetic corpus with the real cascade decision path; physical corpus regen remains the authorized-run step

30_tests_accept_malformed_qualified.where: the test helper builds well-formed qualified outcomes WITH evidence; a separate test feeds a malformed one and asserts it is rejected

31_no_resolver_or_io_failure_tests.where: resolver-raise, iterator-raise, malformed-outcome, preexisting/complete/partial checkpoint, duplicate/zero-row/shorter/longer population all covered

32_test_report_not_governance_evidence.where: the report is marked admissible_as_final=false; it is development evidence pending the clean-commit in-image regeneration

33_overstates_blockers_done.where: this status wording separates implemented components from the image-/commit-level remainder

34_population_runner_overstated.where: described as the orchestration + population loop whose physical corpus regeneration executes only under the authorized run — not a completed end-to-end execution

35_protections_are_prose.where: checkpoint refusal, row-identity + content-hash allowlisting, window lockout, and no-contaminated-checkpoint are now EXECUTABLE gates with tests, not prose

remaining_before_execution_countersignat: the physical corpus regeneration wired into run_clean_successor and executed only under the authorized run (finding 1 residual)
the full 64-hex OCI config digest + a signed launch attestation (findings 5, 22)
an in-image realism-harness PASS artifact at the pinned image (findings 18, 28)
a final test report: clean tree, pinned image, production-binding test RUN (findings 28, 32)
the formally-enumerated model input contract derived from _qp_matrices (finding 23)
scope_boundary: This package authorizes NOTHING to execute. run_clean_successor refuses without a verified countersigned authorization artifact. MR002_Implementation_Erratum_v1.0 remains SUSPENDED; the quarantined AMENDED PASS remains non-reusable; preflight CLOSED; performance NOT COMPUTED; validation and sealed OOS SEALED AND UNREAD.
